change_log_latest:
• 🐞 Fixed detached Metrics storage-browser routing so folder navigation and delayed size-refresh updates stay pinned to the popup host instead of duplicating the browser modal into the main window.
• 🖥️ Added minimize support plus a browser-side open-file taskbar for storage editors, making multiple open files practical and allowing quick reopen/switch flows from the navigation modal.
• 🖥️ Added unsaved-close handling for storage editors with Cancel, Save, and Discard choices, while keeping the Duplicate action limited to detached Metrics browsers and restoring the direct small-file text/hex editor path.
change_log_release:
v0.9.34

• 🖥️ Added a Duplicate action to detached Metrics storage browsers so the current folder can be intentionally mirrored into the main window for side-by-side browsing.
• 🧰 Reworked the storage browser and file/hex editor around 1 MB chunked file sessions with a 1 GB open limit plus per-window activity feedback for file operations.
• 🐞 Fixed detached Metrics storage/editor state so popup and main-window browser clones can navigate different folders independently without fighting over the same modal state.
• 🐞 Fixed detached Metrics storage-browser refresh handling so delayed folder-size refreshes stay pinned to the detached popup host instead of reopening the browser modal in the main window.
• 🖥️ Hid the storage-browser Duplicate action unless the modal was launched from detached Metrics, so the button only appears where that side-by-side workflow is valid.
• 🐞 Restored the direct sub-1 MB file/browser editor path while keeping chunked 1 MB file sessions for larger files, fixing the broken small-file text and hex editor behavior introduced by the streaming refactor.

v0.9.33

• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics so the file navigator, file editor, and hex editor now open inside the popup window instead of rendering back in the main admin window.
• 🐞 Fixed the async detached Metrics storage-browser launch path so popup file navigation no longer snaps back into the main admin window after a delayed modal open.

v0.9.32

• 🛠️ Updated the build and self-update pipeline for the new src-based source layout and root metadata.json, including root-level GitHub metadata lookups for both branch-ref and SHA-pinned update checks.
• 🖥️ Added detachable Metrics popout and reattach behavior that mirrors the existing Logs workflow.
• 🖥️ Fixed mobile preset cards so Disk and TPS pills wrap only when space runs out, keeping launch controls left-aligned and icon actions pinned right.
• 🛠️ Added an explicit --iterative build mode so release iteration can advance letter suffixes on the same numeric version while normal builds continue to bump the patch version.
• 📝 Documented the src-based build layout, root metadata.json release flow, and the new normal-versus-iterative build commands in the README.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics so the popout icon now sits beside the Metrics title like Logs, popup tab switches stay inside the detached window, and reattach only happens from the reattach icon or by closing the popup.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics actions so popup-triggered confirmations stay in the detached window instead of opening back in the main panel.
• 🖥️ Added a detached-state placeholder inside the Metrics tab so the panel explains when metrics are currently popped out instead of rendering as an empty surface.
• 🐞 Fixed update detection to prefer the SHA-pinned root metadata.json over the potentially stale branch-ref raw URL, while still falling back to refs/heads/master/metadata.json when SHA resolution is unavailable.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics so the popout button now stays borderless like Logs, live metric updates continue flowing into the detached window, and the in-panel detached placeholder remains visible instead of leaving the tab blank.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics actions so Clear Recorded Metrics, Storage Browser, Mount/Unmount, File Editor, and Hex Editor now forward into the detached window instead of breaking or falling back to the main panel/browser prompts.
• 🐞 Fixed update detection to prefer the SHA-pinned root metadata.json over a potentially stale branch-ref raw cache while still falling back to refs/heads/master/metadata.json when SHA resolution is unavailable.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics so the popout button now stays borderless like Logs, live metric updates continue flowing into the detached window, and the in-panel detached placeholder remains visible instead of leaving the tab blank.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics actions so Clear Recorded Metrics, Storage Browser, Mount/Unmount, File Editor, and Hex Editor now forward into the detached window instead of breaking or falling back to the main panel/browser prompts.
• 🐞 Fixed update detection to prefer the SHA-pinned root metadata.json over a potentially stale branch-ref raw cache while still falling back to refs/heads/master/metadata.json when SHA resolution is unavailable.
• 🖥️ Fixed detached Metrics so popup-local styling now matches the main panel, detached storage and editor modals render inside the popup window, and the attached Metrics tab collapses down to only the detached placeholder state while popped out.
• 🐞 Fixed Metrics storage rendering to drop duplicate root-backed alias cards such as the /var/tmp duplicate for /dev/nvme0n1p2, and redraw detached charts immediately after popup resize settles.
• 🐞 Hardened persisted Metrics peak sanitization so absurd TPS outliers are discarded instead of being stored and shown as impossible all-time maxima.
• 🖥️ Simplified the detached Metrics placeholder so the attached tab now shows only the detached description without the redundant extra detached label.
• 🖥️ Extended detached Metrics modal forwarding so the storage browser and file/hex editor modal stack continues rendering inside the detached popup window instead of falling back to the main panel.

v0.9.31

• 🟢 Added the ability to hide presets with immediate reconciliation so hiding or restoring a preset updates the source card list instantly and stale status polls cannot resurrect it.
• 🖥️ Redesigned preset resource markers with a broader full-spectrum palette and stable unique color assignment for shared resources.
• 🟢 Added a Manage Manager with total disk usage card, directory resource names and a preset count on each resource card.
• 🟢 Added a per-preset cache trash action so runtime caches can be cleared separately from downloaded model resources.
• 🖥️ Expanded the storage browser and file editor dialogs with aligned file-name columns, requested toolbar ordering, compact parent-folder glyphs, cleaner preview padding, and single-scroll editor behavior.
• 🟢 Added fast root filesystem browsing with asynchronous background directory size estimation so large folders no longer freeze the panel while sizes settle.
• 🖥️ Rebuilt binary file editing around a lightweight responsive single-field hex editor with synchronized ASCII preview and dynamic byte columns.
• 🐞 Fixed queued messages for unloaded presets so the load modal closes, the saved preset is awaited in the runtime list, and the queued chat sends afterward.
• 🟢 Added a root filesystem volume card to System Volumes so the main filesystem can be managed directly from the admin panel.
• 🧩 Made legacy DFlash vLLM presets resilient by mapping dead nightly pins to the restored stable v0.22 image path and skipping obsolete PR35936 overlays on newer vLLM layouts.
• 🛠️ Moved changelog and supported-upstream metadata exclusively to GitHub metadata.json so the installer keeps only SCRIPT_VERSION while the updater reads release details from metadata.json.
• 🟢 Added Delete Model + Caches actions so preset/resource cleanup can remove downloaded assets and associated runtime caches from one confirmation dialog.
• 🛠️ Added letter-suffixed script version support so repeated builds such as v0.9.31c compare correctly in the updater and produce distinct backup tags.
• 🛠️ Updated the build and self-update pipeline for the new src-based source layout and root metadata.json, including root-level GitHub metadata lookups for both branch-ref and SHA-pinned update checks.
• 🖥️ Added detachable Metrics popout and reattach behavior that mirrors the existing Logs workflow.
• 🖥️ Fixed mobile preset cards so Disk and TPS pills wrap only when space runs out, keeping launch controls left-aligned and icon actions pinned right.

v0.9.30

• 🖥️ Added additional GDDR6/GDDR6X junction and VRAM temperature telemetry to the Main-tab GPU cards and per-GPU Metrics charts via an external optional helper.
• 🧰 Hardened GDDR6/GDDR6X junction and VRAM temperature setup so installs, updates, and migrations install helper dependencies, bundle the necessary NVIDIA NVML header, stage the needed 'iomem=relaxed' kernel command, and print a reboot notice only when the running kernel still needs it.
• 🧰 Vendored the GDDR6/GDDR6X temperature helper source and NVIDIA NVML header into the installer so junction/VRAM telemetry setup no longer depends on external repository availability during install, update, or migrate.
• ⚙️ Added a --skip-temps switch to bypass all extra GPU temperature helper setup, dependency installation, bootloader staging, and reboot notices when operators want the previous install behavior.
• 📝 Documented the new --skip-temps installer switch in the shipped usage header so operators can explicitly opt out of optional junction/VRAM temperature helper setup.

v0.9.29

• ⚡ Reduced the shipped admin/control payload by removing unreferenced backend and UI helper paths while preserving current runtime behavior.
• 🐞 Restored Generation Stats KV/context/prefix/token labels to the coloned format and request-scoped context fallback expected by the admin panel.

v0.9.28

• 🐞 Restored the Metrics GPU subtab chart rendering to the working v0.8.54 behavior so GPU temperature, power, utilization, and VRAM charts draw correctly again while the faster first-load metrics polling remains in place.

v0.9.27

• 🐞 Fixed Metrics loading so the control service warms a chart-history sample at startup, Metrics tab activation immediately requests series data, and GPU metric charts render current cached telemetry instead of blank fields while history is still arriving.

v0.9.26

• 🐞 Fixed streamed markdown list rendering so split ordered and unordered markers like 3 + . Ruby or - + item are repaired during generation, preserving bold/italic formatting without waiting for the final render pass.

v0.9.25

• 🐞 Fixed chat input-token accounting so per-message and conversation Generation Stats count only actual user message content instead of full prepended prompt context.
• 🐞 Restored streamed markdown finalization and narrowed the live plain-preview fallback so closed markdown blocks keep rendering during generation and dollar-heavy/code-heavy replies finish as rich markdown without a reload.

v0.9.24

• ⚡ Compact embedded compressed payload declarations onto single-line base64 strings so the installer no longer wastes bytes on wrapped payload line breaks.

v0.9.23

• ⚡ Further reduced the installer size by max-gzip packing the embedded control and updater Python payloads behind tiny runtime unpackers while preserving the generated files written on install/update.

v0.9.22

• ⚡ Reduced the shipped installer size by compressing the embedded admin web UI payload and enabling stronger safe JavaScript minification while preserving the existing panel behavior.
• ⚡ Removed inactive migrated UI leftovers from the packaged admin bundle, including obsolete smart-title, legacy stats, model-install, log-popup, and duplicate metrics-chart helper paths.

v0.9.21

• 🐞 Fixed `/admin/model-install` so the backend now falls back to the preset's canonical install command and accepts harmless whitespace formatting differences instead of failing the request before the downloader can start.
• 🐞 Restored per-message chat token labels so user turns once again show their own input token counts and assistant turns keep their own output token counts beneath each message.
• 🐞 Restored cumulative Generation Statistics token totals in both Main and Chat by carrying full-conversation input/output rollups through the saved conversation runtime snapshot instead of collapsing those cards back to the latest turn only.
• 🐞 Restored built-in Hugging Face download progress updates for repos whose API metadata omits file sizes by falling back to direct file-header probes instead of treating those downloads as zero-byte unknowns and fixing the backend repo-size probe used for 5% Audit Log updates, so model installs no longer go silent after the initial downloader instruction
• 🐞 Fixed the chat transcript auto-scroll toggle so its on/off state now persists with the saved conversation and survives browser refreshes instead of snapping back on every reload.
• 🐞 Restored Main-tab Generation Statistics to show used / total context with a live percentage again, and brought KV usage back for runtimes that only emit newer llama.cpp-style slot-release metrics.
• 🛠️ Build releases now require explicit --change notes and automatically bump metadata.json plus changelog sections before packaging.
• 🐞 Restored live KV usage for runtimes that only emit newer llama.cpp-style `n_ctx` / `n_past` slot-release logs by deriving GPU KV utilization from those lines, so KV% no longer stays stuck at 0 or blank while the context window is actively filling.
• 🐞 Fixed large chat conversations silently failing to save after long markdown-heavy generations by disabling browser `keepalive` on oversized `/admin/chat-state` POSTs, so completed replies now persist to server-side conversation storage instead of only appearing in the live DOM.
• 🐞 Hardened Chat hydration so conversation switching, new-chat creation, attachments, presets, and send controls stay disabled until server conversation titles are loaded, preventing fast early clicks from being overwritten by the initial hydration response.
• 🐞 Added backend conversation self-healing from saved `stream-state`, so if the browser misses a final stream update or a tab hangs/reloads, reopening the chat can recover the finished assistant reply directly into the conversation file instead of leaving an empty assistant turn on disk.
• 🐞 Preserved the scientific-markdown parser fix and the lightweight streaming fallback for technical/math-heavy content, which together stop the common list-and-math turn freeze while still allowing the full markdown render after completion.
• 🐞 Fixed the actual scientific-markdown freeze root cause: bullet lines containing ordinary numbered values like `1.1` or `19.04` were being misclassified as ordered-list items during chat markdown rendering, which trapped the parser in an infinite loop and froze the web UI on technical replies.
• 🐞 Kept the browser-side stream recovery and wrapped-markdown fixes in place so interrupted generations can still be restored from saved `stream-state`, and soft-wrapped inline formatting/list markers continue to normalize correctly.
• 🐞 Added a safe streaming fallback for LaTeX/math-heavy replies so technical content no longer runs through the expensive incremental markdown path mid-generation, preventing first-turn chat freezes on scientific answers while preserving the full markdown render once the reply finishes.
• 🐞 Fixed browser-side chat recovery to preserve `generationActive` across rehydration and keep backend `stream-state` snapshots available for resumed conversations after a tab reload or stalled client stream.
• 🐞 Restored `generationActive` when conversations are rehydrated from disk so a reopened chat correctly re-enters stream recovery instead of showing an empty assistant turn and never resuming.
• 🐞 Extended streamed markdown soft-wrap normalization to repair split ordered-list markers like `3` + `. Step ...`, alongside the earlier wrapped bold/italics/inline-code/list-text fixes.

v0.9.20

• 🐞 Fixed Metrics peak tracking so chart maxima now record true persistent highs instead of falling with the rolling sample window, and they continue to survive control-service restarts.
• 🖥️ Added a trash-can reset action to the Metrics card so you can clear the saved chart history and persisted maxima from the existing confirmation-modal flow.
• 🐞 Fixed the mobile/web chat freeze after repeated long generations by reducing hidden-tab Metrics redraw work and skipping transcript syntax-highlight scans for streamed replies that contain no code blocks, preserving smooth streaming while keeping the local chat tab responsive on extended multi-turn chats.

v0.9.19

• 🐞 Fixed the installer `--update` regression by hardening Python resolution so the control/server update flow no longer trusts a polluted `PYTHON_BIN` value before persisting the Hugging Face token and rewriting managed files.
• 🐞 Fixed web-panel preset launch validation for variants like `beellama/dflash` by preserving `model_path`, `draft_model_path`, and `mmproj_path` inside the runtime mode tables instead of dropping them during inventory compaction.
• 🐞 Reworked preset install jobs so Hugging Face model downloads now always go through the built-in admin downloader first, even when the preset recipe uses `setup.sh`, which restores consistent Audit Log progress reporting and avoids shell-only fallback downloads.
• 🐞 Fixed the split-source model-install helper wiring so rebuilt admins no longer depend on the integrated monolith for the shared model-path parser that powers download planning and setup handoff.
• 🐞 Fixed `beellama/dflash` rollout on the live 3090 host by validating its shipped GGUF assets, pulling the required beellama runtime image, and confirming the preset now boots and answers requests successfully.
• 🐞 Stopped runtime-inventory fallback probes from leaking bogus `no recipe for path ...` noise into control logs while checking alternate weight recipes, keeping preset/download diagnostics focused on real failures.

v0.9.18

• 🐞 Fixed web-panel preset launch validation for variants like `beellama/dflash` by preserving `model_path`, `draft_model_path`, and `mmproj_path` inside the runtime mode tables instead of dropping them during inventory compaction.
• 🐞 Reworked preset install jobs so Hugging Face model downloads now always go through the built-in admin downloader first, even when the preset recipe uses `setup.sh`, which restores consistent Audit Log progress reporting and avoids shell-only fallback downloads.
• 🐞 Fixed the split-source model-install helper wiring so rebuilt admins no longer depend on the integrated monolith for the shared model-path parser that powers download planning and setup handoff.
• 🐞 Fixed `beellama/dflash` rollout on the live 3090 host by validating its shipped GGUF assets, pulling the required beellama runtime image, and confirming the preset now boots and answers requests successfully.
• 🐞 Stopped runtime-inventory fallback probes from leaking bogus `no recipe for path ...` noise into control logs while checking alternate weight recipes, keeping preset/download diagnostics focused on real failures.

v0.9.17

• 🐞 Reworked preset install jobs so Hugging Face model downloads now always go through the built-in admin downloader first, even when the preset recipe uses `setup.sh`, which restores consistent Audit Log progress reporting and avoids shell-only fallback downloads.
• 🐞 Fixed the split-source model-install helper wiring so rebuilt admins no longer depend on the integrated monolith for the shared model-path parser that powers download planning and setup handoff.
• 🐞 Fixed `beellama/dflash` rollout on the live 3090 host by validating its shipped GGUF assets, pulling the required beellama runtime image, and confirming the preset now boots and answers requests successfully.
• 🐞 Stopped runtime-inventory fallback probes from leaking bogus `no recipe for path ...` noise into control logs while checking alternate weight recipes, keeping preset/download diagnostics focused on real failures.

v0.9.16

• 🐞 Reworked preset install jobs so Hugging Face model downloads now always go through the built-in admin downloader first, even when the preset recipe uses `setup.sh`, which restores consistent Audit Log progress reporting and avoids shell-only fallback downloads.
• 🐞 Fixed the split-source model-install helper wiring so rebuilt admins no longer depend on the integrated monolith for the shared model-path parser that powers download planning and setup handoff.
• 🐞 Fixed the live `beellama/dflash` preset rollout by validating its shipped GGUF assets, pulling the required beellama runtime image on the host, and confirming the preset now boots and answers requests successfully on the remote 3090 machine.

v0.9.15

• 🐞 Restored the split-source chat runtime-stats scheduler so rebuilt admins keep updating Generation Stats on the live two-second cadence during active chat generations instead of falling behind the shipped bundle.
• 🐞 Restored `conversation_id` on streamed admin-chat requests in the split web sources so live chat metrics stay bound to the active conversation and rebuilt installers no longer drop runtime stats updates back to end-of-generation only.
• 🐞 Added ik-llama speculative/prompt-cache log parsing so runtimes like `ik-llama/iq4ks-two-stage` now surface drafted, accepted, acceptance-rate, mean-acceptance, and prompt-cache prefix-hit stats instead of staying stuck at zeroed placeholders.

v0.9.14

• 🐞 Fixed the GitHub update checker so oversized remote build/metadata.json changelogs no longer break update detection, restoring the green update notice without needing a manual forced update.
• 🐞 Restored live preset-download progress reporting in Audit Logs across both direct hf download commands and setup.sh-driven preset installs, so large model/resource pulls no longer run blind.
• 🖥️ Fixed preset cards in the Models tab so presets that are already running now show Stop there too instead of incorrectly falling back to Launch.
• 🖥️ Added hover tooltips on preset Download buttons that show the Hugging Face repo slug or direct model URL source behind that download action.
• 🖥️ Restored NVLink preset grouping for upstream composes that now advertise NVLink via their newer auto-detected header text instead of the older dedicated nvlink file names.

v0.9.13

• 🐞 Fixed the live admin/proxy request snapshot path so Main-tab Generation Statistics now refresh during active generations instead of only updating after the request finishes.
• 🐞 Restored speculative/MTP stat propagation in both live and settled runtime snapshots, so drafted, accepted, acceptance-rate, and mean-acceptance values no longer stay pinned at zero after generation completes.
• 🖥️ Forced active-request status polling back onto the fast cadence and normalized missing prefix-cache reads to display as 0% instead of a dash in Generation Statistics.

v0.9.12

• 🐞 Fixed the Presets Summary selector so clicking Summary now reliably returns to the cached summary view instead of snapping back to the last saved model tab.
• 🖥️ Cleaned up preset disk markers so GGUF/model assets stay solid, only mmproj projector files render hollow, Hugging Face download-cache placeholders disappear, and directory-backed vLLM resources now surface a file-type hint in the marker tooltip.
• 🐞 Restored live Generation Statistics updates during active chat generations by applying incremental stream-metrics events as they arrive instead of waiting for the final response.
• 🐞 Fixed streamed speculative/MTP Generation Statistics so prefix-cache, drafted, accepted, acceptance-rate, and average-acceptance figures flow through the live chat metrics/state path again.

v0.9.11

• 🐞 Fixed the Presets Summary selector so clicking Summary now reliably returns to the cached summary view instead of snapping back to the last saved model tab.
• 🖥️ Cleaned up preset disk markers so GGUF/model assets stay solid, only mmproj projector files render hollow, Hugging Face download-cache placeholders disappear, and directory-backed vLLM resources now surface a file-type hint in the marker tooltip.
• 🐞 Restored live Generation Statistics updates during active chat generations by applying incremental stream-metrics events as they arrive instead of waiting for the final response.
• 🐞 Fixed streamed speculative/MTP Generation Statistics so prefix-cache, drafted, accepted, acceptance-rate, and average-acceptance figures flow through the live chat metrics/state path again.

v0.9.10

• 🐞 Fixed preset disk accounting so Hugging Face cache-backed and SGLang presets no longer report Ready with 0 GB while still being launchable, and the Delete action now stays hidden unless a preset actually consumes disk.
• 🖥️ Added per-resource disk markers beside each preset’s Disk label, with shared resources reusing the same color across presets and projector/shared sidecar files such as mmproj rendering as hollow circles.
• 🖥️ Reworked preset status/download badge colors so deprecated, caveats, needs download, blocked, exited, unknown, and related tags no longer collide, and production + caveats now render as separate tags.
• 🐞 Fixed live chat open-code-fence previews so streamed markdown code keeps its line breaks before the closing fence arrives instead of collapsing into a single wrapped line.

v0.9.9

• 🐞 Restored the scoped Benchmark, Run Report, and Rebench actions to the Instances card, kept Update in the System card, and removed the stale layout shim that was rebuilding the old button row into shipped admins.
• 🛠️ Trimmed the dead v0.8 System/Instances layout glue from the split web sources so the rebuilt installer no longer carries duplicate UI rearrangement code.

v0.9.8

• ⚡ Live-retuned the new Qwen 3.6 APEX/Hauhau presets on the remote 3090, promoting Luffy Genesis to q4_0 K/V at 196K and documenting the fastest stable KV/MTP defaults for Carnice, Qwopus, and HauhauCS.

v0.9.7

• 🐞 Restored the v0.8.54 Debug Logs bash command lane, shell autocomplete/history, transfer controls, and detached Docker-runtime log selector that were lost during the v0.9 compose split.
• 🖥️ Restored the System card Rebench action alongside Benchmark, Run Report, and Update after the migrated layout had fallen back to an older button set.
• 🖥️ Restored the richer Setup Assistant survey, advanced NVLink/Multi-GPU preset grouping, custom provenance badges, and saved-chat load-original-preset flow from the stable v0.8 branch.
• ⚙️ Runtime launches plus proxy/local inference wake the GPUs back into the Default power profile before starting work, preventing idle optimization from poisoning fresh runs.
• 🖥️ Added per-preset disk-usage labels and a red Delete flow that shows the exact downloaded model resources and reclaim size before removing them from disk.
• 🖥️ Added a per-GPU free-resources trash action on the Main GPU cards, which stops/removes runtime containers using that GPU and frees pinned VRAM even when a container was started outside the panel.
• 🐞 Restored the v0.8 multi-download/custom-model job status handling so parallel model downloads and custom import jobs stay visible in the Presets tab.
• 🧩 Marked the migrated upstream Club-3090 target and its dirty/local describe variants as compatible so supported installs no longer show a false unsupported-repo warning.

v0.9.6

• 🐞 Restored the v0.8.54 Debug Logs bash command lane, shell autocomplete/history, transfer controls, and detached Docker-runtime log selector that were lost during the v0.9 compose split.
• 🖥️ Restored the System card Rebench action alongside Benchmark, Run Report, and Update after the migrated layout had fallen back to an older button set.
• ⚙️ Runtime launches plus proxy/local inference wake the GPUs back into the Default power profile before starting work, preventing idle optimization from poisoning fresh runs.
• 🖥️ Added per-preset disk-usage labels and a red Delete flow that shows the exact downloaded model resources and reclaim size before removing them from disk.
• 🖥️ Added a per-GPU free-resources trash action on the Main GPU cards, which stops/removes runtime containers using that GPU and frees pinned VRAM even when a container was started outside the panel.
• 🧩 Marked the migrated upstream Club-3090 target and its dirty/local describe variants as compatible so supported installs no longer show a false unsupported-repo warning.

v0.9.5

• 🧩 Added experimental built-in Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B APEX-MTP presets for Genesis, Carnice, and Qwopus plus a Qwen 3.6 27B HauhauCS MTP preset, each wired to direct Hugging Face model downloads and the shared thinking-aware Jinja chat template.
• ⚡ Retuned the APEX fit presets to the live-validated q8_0 K / q4_0 V hybrid, keeping 196K context while improving single-card 3090 TPS over the previous q8/q5 default.
• 🖥️ Added persistent Max/Avg TPS labels to every preset card, backed by per-preset inference history with shift-click and mobile long-press clearing.
• 🐞 Restored the Preset Launch Settings gear/modal from the v0.8 branch and kept Generation Statistics aligned with saved preset context/model overrides after the v0.9 compose migration.
• 🐞 Fixed runtime-inventory and migration setup for the new upstream compose hierarchy so GGUF variants use direct model downloads or their declared verify globs instead of aborting --migrate after a successful GGUF pull.
• 🐞 Fixed preset switching for the new compose hierarchy so existing ik-llama containers are stopped before launching another preset instead of leaving VRAM pinned.

v0.9.4

• 🐞 Restored canonical preset selectors on rebuilt runtime-inventory variants, keeping v0.9’s migrated compose registry aligned with selector-driven launch settings, cached preset state, and custom/runtime tooling that still expects explicit selectors on each preset row.

v0.9.3

• 🐞 Fixed relative `MODEL_DIR` resolution so compose-relative model locations still resolve correctly during fresh installs, migration checks, and launch planning even before the target directory exists.
• 🐞 Fixed custom-model path ownership checks to use normalized in-root validation when deriving repo-relative compose paths and cleaning up imported compose folders.

v0.9.2

• 🐞 Fixed v0.9’s nested compose-family launch paths so per-instance boots and global vLLM switches resolve the correct runtime cache and patch roots again instead of inheriting stale pre-hierarchy paths.
• 🐞 Fixed imported custom-model rebuild fallback paths so older registry entries still resolve to `custom-models/<id>/docker-compose.yml` during inventory rebuilds and migrations.

v0.9.1

• 🐞 Fixed the split runtime-inventory source so standalone rebuild and migration validation paths load the shared control helpers correctly again instead of failing before the v0.9 preset catalog can be rebuilt.
• 🐞 Restored the inventory module’s built-in default single/dual preset selector helpers, keeping fallback preset resolution aligned with the newer compose-registry catalog during rebuilds and update checks.

v0.9.0

• 🧩 Updated Club-3090 Server for the reworked upstream compose hierarchy, so nested preset families like `autoround-int4`, `awq`, `unsloth-q4km`, `ubergarm-iq4ks`, `ex0bit-prism-pro-dq`, and `mudler-apex-*` are discovered and launched correctly again.
• 🐞 Replaced the stale preset download heuristics with profile-driven asset planning from the latest upstream metadata, fixing Download/ready-state handling for newer Qwen, Gemma, llama.cpp, and ik-llama presets plus the corrected Qwen 35B-A3B fallback repo path.
• 🐞 Reworked `--migrate` to replay the required upstream setup commands on the fresh checkout and normalize preserved legacy Qwen GGUF assets into the paths the newer upstream composes expect, instead of relying on the older model-only `update.sh` fallback.
• 🖥️ Split `ik-llama` back out from the generic `llama.cpp` label in preset cards so the UI once again reflects the actual runtime family being launched.

v0.8.47

• 🖥️ Upgraded Debug Logs transfers so typing a folder path or glob like *.sh in the bash field can now expand into a zip download directly from the current debug-shell context, with a trailing : disabling recursive glob matching.
• 🖥️ Added shift-click and mobile long-press folder upload in Debug Logs, which zips the selected folder in-browser and uploads the archive into the current debug-shell directory while streaming zip/upload progress into Debug Logs.
• 🐞 Fixed the Debug Logs command box so plain Backspace/Delete edit normally again, Ctrl+Backspace clears one autocomplete section at a time, Ctrl+Up/Ctrl+Down restore in-progress drafts more reliably, and saved command history now deduplicates old repeats automatically.

v0.8.45

• 🖥️ Upgraded Debug Logs transfers so typing a folder path or glob like `*.sh` in the bash field can now expand into a zip download directly from the current debug-shell context, with a trailing `:` disabling recursive glob matching.
• 🖥️ Added shift-click and mobile long-press folder upload in Debug Logs, which zips the selected folder in-browser and uploads the archive into the current debug-shell directory while streaming zip/upload progress into Debug Logs.
• 🐞 Fixed the Debug Logs command box so plain Backspace/Delete edit normally again, `Ctrl+Backspace` clears one autocomplete section at a time, Ctrl+Up/Ctrl+Down restore in-progress drafts more reliably, and saved command history now deduplicates old repeats automatically.

v0.8.44

• 🐞 Fixed Preset Launch Settings runtime stats so the Generation Statistics pane now reflects the actual launched context limit from saved preset overrides instead of always reporting the compose default.
• 🐞 Corrected the `ik-llama/apex-mtp-compact` preset metadata so its catalog card now reports `KV: q4_0`, matching the shipped compose lane instead of incorrectly showing `q8_0`.
• 🧩 Refreshed the bundled Club-3090 preset sources against the live host so the newer PRISM-PRO-DQ and APEX ik-llama preset family changes are present in the local upstream checkout and upstream change report.

v0.8.43

• 🐞 Removed backdrop-click dismissal across the admin modal stack so selecting or interacting with modal content no longer closes dialogs unexpectedly.
• 🐞 Fixed APEX preset launch confirmations so single-GPU scope labels no longer repeat the same GPU text twice.
• 🖥️ Stopped every admin-panel modal from closing on backdrop clicks, so text selection and other in-modal interactions now stay stable until you use the explicit close or action buttons.
• 🐞 Fixed single-GPU preset launch confirmations so scope labels no longer repeat the same GPU description twice.
• 🐞 Fixed chat conversation preset tracking so saved single-GPU chats keep their original container assignment visible, render unavailable presets at the top of the Container dropdown, and can load the saved preset and send the pending message as soon as boot finishes.
• 🐞 Fixed APEX no-thinking behavior in both admin chat and proxy preset endpoints by removing leaked leading think blocks whenever the effective request explicitly disables thinking, while leaving reasoning-enabled requests untouched.
• 🖥️ Reworked Debug Logs autocomplete so `Ctrl+Space` now triggers command completion while ordinary spaces type normally again.
• 🐞 Fixed chat conversation preset tracking so saved single-GPU chats keep their original container assignment visible, render unavailable presets at the top of the Container dropdown, and can load the saved preset and send the pending message as soon as boot finishes.
• ⚙️ Updated the APEX ik-llama compose variants to use the Qwen jinja template path and auto-map reasoning tokens from the active reasoning mode, so Preset Launch Settings can still toggle thinking on and off cleanly.
• 🖥️ Added the Docker runtime selector to detached log popouts, kept popout switching tied to the same active runtime, and stopped log-focus jumps from targeting the in-page viewer while logs are detached.
• 🐞 Fixed the long-context APEX and PRISM ik-llama presets so Preset Launch Settings once again exposes their structured fields instead of falling back to raw engine switches only.
• 🐞 Fixed thinking-aware proxy/admin chat defaults for local runtimes so `enable_thinking` now stays off when server reasoning is off, and only turns on for reasoning-enabled runtimes or explicit thinking API presets.
• 🐞 Restored 5% Audit Log progress updates for direct-file Hugging Face downloads such as the PRISM GGUF pulls, extended that tracking across fallback install commands, and normalized shared mmproj-F16.gguf assets into hardlinks instead of duplicating the same projector file across preset folders.
• 🖥️ Added the custom engine-switches textarea to both the Custom Model modal and the Preset Launch Settings modal, placed the preset-level field above Additional env overrides, and cleaned the launch-setting defaults so they no longer duplicate values or leak stray dash/prose prefixes into the UI.
• 🖥️ Reworked the Debug Logs command box into a fish-style shell lane with inline ghost completion, rolling Ctrl+Up / Ctrl+Down command history, and Ctrl+Space autocomplete that color-codes history suggestions in blue and path suggestions in orange while reading from the live debug-shell folder plus recent commands and the ghost text keeps history suggestions blue while path suggestions stay orange.
• 🐞 Fixed the Custom Model modal so text selection no longer collapses the dialog, added an editable custom engine-switches textarea sourced from the selected reference compose, and cleaned up launch-setting fields so defaults like Max Context and Ngram Max Draft no longer duplicate or leak explanatory prose into the value.

v0.8.42

• 🐞 Extended the GPU remap fix across the broader container launch surface by exporting host GPU IDs through `ESTATE_GPUS` while forcing container-local CUDA/NVIDIA ordinals for generated instance overrides and direct launch env preparation, which protects higher-index single, dual, and imported preset boots from the same host-vs-container mismatch.
• 🐞 Added launch-path regression coverage for both generated override files and the backend hardware-guard env mapping, so future preset/runtime changes fail the build before GPU1+ scopes silently regress again.

v0.8.41

• 🐞 Fixed Global-scope ik-llama single-card fan-out so non-zero GPU lanes now remap container CUDA ordinals correctly instead of passing host GPU IDs into already-isolated containers, which restores GPU1+ boots and stops the 
o CUDA-capable device is detected` crash loop.
• 🐞 Fixed generated single/dual instance launch overrides to separate Docker's physical GPU reservation from the runtime's in-container CUDA view, which also prevents higher-index pair/scope launches from silently targeting the wrong device layout.

v0.8.40

• 🐞 Fixed llama.cpp and ik-llama boot completion detection so single-card presets now clear Booting as soon as their local runtime API is actually reachable, instead of waiting on vLLM-specific startup markers that never arrive.
• 🐞 Fixed per-instance and Global scope readiness tracking for non-vLLM single-card presets, which restores live Booting/Active state reporting for the newer ik-llama lanes and prevents the panel from leaving them stuck in a fake in-between state.

v0.8.39

• 🖥️ Added a launch-settings gear button to preset cards, with selector-scoped persistent overrides for compose-exposed launch envs plus manual advanced env overrides, so each preset can keep its own saved context, sampling, and engine settings.
• 🐞 Fixed newer llama.cpp and ik-llama single-card presets to trust their live compose defaults for context sizing and promoted-status labeling, which removes the bogus Unknown badge path and restores visible max-ctx reporting for lanes like `ik-llama/iq4ks-two-stage`.
• 🐞 Added 5% Audit Log progress updates for simple Hugging Face preset downloads such as the IQ4_KS two-stage GGUF pull, so large installs no longer appear frozen until the final completion line.
• 🧩 Updated the supported Club-3090 target metadata to the newer upstream head that surfaces the promoted single-card llama-family preset changes.

v0.8.38

• 🐞 Fixed cold-start first-token stalls on affected vLLM presets by forcing Club-3090 Server to launch them with an absolute persistent Triton/vLLM compile-cache override instead of relying on fragile relative compose cache mounts.
• ⚡ Added an automatic throwaway post-ready warmup generation for vLLM preset launches, so the expensive first-request Triton JIT pass is paid during startup instead of by the first real user prompt.

v0.8.37

• 🐞 Fixed the ik-llama Qwen 3.6 preset download wiring so those cards now request the correct GGUF and vision mmproj assets directly instead of rerunning the generic AutoRound qwen3.6-27b setup path.
• 🐞 Corrected shell-default compose-path parsing for inventory-derived install recipes, which lets preset-specific asset downloads resolve real file targets from upstream compose defaults instead of leaking raw ${VAR:-default} placeholders into the UI.

v0.8.36

• 🖥️ Reworked the Debug Logs shell lane so the command field now matches the live log viewer styling, expands across the full available width, and adds stacked upload/download controls for moving files straight from the current debug-shell folder.
• 🧩 Added shell-aware file transfers in the Logs tab, including confirmation against the live debug-shell working directory, sudo-backed remote writes/reads, multi-file zip downloads, and 5% progress/speed updates in the debug viewer during transfers.
• 🐞 Fixed the newer Qwen 3.6 ik-llama presets so shipped badges no longer fall through to unknown, missing GGUF/mmproj assets now surface as Download instead of Ready, and startup failures from missing model files fail cleanly instead of leaving presets stuck on Booting.
• 🧩 Updated the supported Club-3090 metadata to the migrated upstream checkout so compatible installs stop showing the red unsupported-version banner after the new repo is in place.

v0.8.35

• 🐞 Extended the live chat Markdown split guard so streamed replies no longer sever common multi-line inline formatting spans such as bold, emphasis, inline code, strikethrough, and link labels/destinations when a paragraph wraps across lines.
• 🧪 Added regression coverage for multi-line strong, emphasis, inline-code, strikethrough, and link-span split normalization so future streaming Markdown changes fail the build before these wrap bugs reach the panel.

v0.8.34

• 🐞 Fixed local chat generation hangs that could start appearing after a few turns by stopping the browser from aborting and replacing in-flight conversation-state saves while a chat session was still active.
• ⚡ Reduced chat-state save pressure during active use by serializing pending state writes, removing ordinary keepalive-mode POSTs, and keeping routine runtime-stat syncs local instead of constantly pushing them back to the server.
• 🐞 Added orphaned-stream recovery so if a live reply loses its stream state after a reload or network hiccup, the chat panel now clears the stuck generating session and lets you continue instead of trapping the page in a dead state.

v0.8.33

• 🐞 Fixed refresh-recovered chat interruptions so pressing Stop after a page reload now sends a real server-side abort for the active conversation instead of showing a dead-end warning.
• 🧰 Added per-conversation live stream stop control on the backend, letting the admin server close the active streaming request, mark it aborted, and expose that state back through the existing recovery/status path.
• 🐞 Fixed ordered-list Markdown rendering so lazy continuation lines stay inside the active numbered item instead of escaping the list and suddenly inheriting larger block styling.
• 🐞 Added smoke coverage for both the recovered-stop flow and the ordered-list continuation regression so future UI changes fail the build if either behavior breaks again.

v0.8.32

• ⚡ Smoothed live transcript follow again by doubling the stream update cadence, halving the maximum follow step, and softening the easing so long code replies drift more like a controlled one-line-at-a-time float instead of a catch-up jump.
• ⚡ Increased the temporary streaming height reserve so the transcript has a bit more room to grow ahead of long replies, helping the live tail stay visible without ever pressing into the bottom edge.

v0.8.31

• ⚡ Smoothed live chat auto-follow further by shrinking the follow band to the last 5% of the transcript, reducing each RAF scroll step, and updating streamed output a little more often so movement feels gentler and less bursty.
• 🐞 Fixed transcript completion behavior so auto-scroll now performs one explicit post-render settle to the true bottom after the final per-turn token/TTFT/tk-s line appears.
• 🐞 Stopped conversation switches from auto-scrolling to the end; transcript follow now stays generation-only outside the final completion settle.

v0.8.30

• ⚡ Reworked live chat auto-follow so streamed replies now glide with the newest rendered line held around the 75% viewport mark instead of jamming against the transcript floor.
• 🐞 Fixed the transcript follow loop so auto-scroll no longer drops out mid-generation and still settles cleanly to the very bottom once a reply finishes.
• 🐞 Fixed streaming Markdown boundary handling so numbered-list items no longer split into broken `2` / `. Java` fragments while content is still arriving.

v0.8.29

• ⚡ Restored controlled reverse motion in the lightweight follow loop so the transcript can settle back onto the exact reserve target instead of only drifting downward.
• 🐞 Kept the follow target tied to the line just before the reserve band, which avoids losing the newest line while still allowing the pan to self-correct naturally.

v0.8.28

• ⚡ Added a resilient transcript follow fallback so the bottom sentinel uses `scrollIntoView` in real browsers and automatically falls back to direct bottom pinning where that DOM API is unavailable, keeping both the shipped panel and the test harness stable.
• 🐞 Fixed the browser-smoke follow verification path so the regenerated `web-ui.test.html` no longer throws on environments like jsdom while still validating that live streaming stays attached near the bottom.

v0.8.27

• ⚡ Reworked transcript follow mode again around a persistent bottom sentinel plus a single RAF-scheduled `scrollIntoView`, so live token streaming now keeps following correctly instead of only snapping to the end when the checkbox is toggled.
• 🐞 Preserved the transcript anchor across full rerenders and placeholder states, which fixes the broken follow behavior caused by rebuilding the transcript DOM while generation was still in progress.

v0.8.26

• ⚡ Reworked chat streaming follow mode to use a CSS bottom-anchor instead of repeated transcript `scrollTop` writes, which keeps token generation smooth while auto-scroll is enabled and still lets the checkbox disable follow mode instantly.
• 🐞 Replaced the composer’s JS height-sync loop with CSS-native textarea growth, removing the resize reflow churn that was making the transcript and input area stutter together during active chatting.

v0.8.25

• 🐞 Reworked the transcript resize-handle gesture again so fit-to-content now uses a tolerant pointer-up triple-tap counter plus a no-pointer-events touch fallback, making the handle reliable on both desktop and mobile instead of depending on the browser’s fragile click-detail behavior.
• 🖥️ Nudged the chat transcript auto-scroll checkbox down another 3px to match the requested alignment under the transcript.
• 🧰 Expanded web/code_syntax.json further so every family now carries explicit operator/separator and related category fields in the file itself, and updated the renderer/build guardrails so those per-family entries are the validated source of truth instead of invisible shared fallback assumptions.

v0.8.24

• 🐞 Fixed the chat transcript resize handle triple-click path by moving fit-to-content detection off the fragile click event and onto a pointer-up tap counter that still works after pointer capture and tiny drag-handle interactions, including in the rebuilt test HTML artifact.
• 🧰 Normalized web/code_syntax.json so every language family now explicitly includes the full category/schema surface instead of sparse per-family fragments, making the supported token coverage visible and auditable directly in the file.

v0.8.23

• ⚡ Smoothed chat transcript streaming while auto-scroll is enabled by stopping programmatic bottom-follow scrolls from re-triggering the interaction defer path, so replies keep rendering token-by-token instead of bunching into visible batches once the transcript starts moving.
• 🖥️ Added a global chat transcript auto-scroll checkbox under the transcript with the same look as the log viewer toggle, kept it in the existing gap, and made the setting persist across conversations and reloads.
• 🐞 Removed the chat transcript resize cap, added triple-click fit-to-content on the resize handle, and expanded the code syntax theme/token coverage so dedicated categories like operators, classes, namespaces, labels, selectors, decorators, and other family-specific tokens use their own configured colors instead of falling back to shared ones.

v0.8.22

• 🐞 Fixed the standalone web-ui.test.html artifact reporting a stale script version by wiring its generator to the current build metadata instead of the old imported fallback constant.

v0.8.21

• ⚡ Smoothed live chat streaming further by locking the transcript viewport height during active generation and batching bottom-follow scroll work, which cuts the resize/reflow churn that was making long replies stutter once the transcript kept growing.
• 🐞 Removed the old code-syntax fallback path so the admin panel now uses the rewritten local code_syntax.json file as its only source of truth, with the embedded payload always overwriting that file on startup and the hardcoded per-block CSS token colors removed so live theme values can actually win.
• 🐞 Reworked generation-stat latency to represent request-to-prompt-start timing instead of whole-turn generation time, using TTFT plus prompt-processing throughput when available and only falling back to backend stream-open timing when the runtime gives nothing better.

v0.8.20

• ⚡ Reworked live chat transcript streaming so open Markdown now stays on a lightweight plain-text lane while a reply is still generating, then the finalized content snaps back through the full Markdown renderer once blocks or the whole reply close for smoother token-by-token updates.
• 🐞 Fixed live code-syntax refresh more aggressively by disabling admin-page/browser reuse, hard-busting /admin/code-syntax fetches with the running script version, and rehighlighting existing transcript code blocks from preserved raw source whenever colors, aliases, or keyword rules change.
• 🐞 Corrected generation stats latency reporting so live turns no longer publish a fake ever-increasing latency mid-stream; TTFT stays live during generation and the real end-to-end latency now appears only once the request actually finishes.

v0.8.19

• ⚡ Reworked live chat transcript streaming so open Markdown now stays on a lightweight plain-text lane while a reply is still generating, then the finalized content snaps back through the full Markdown renderer once blocks or the whole reply close for smoother token-by-token updates.
• 🐞 Fixed live code-syntax refresh more aggressively by disabling admin-page/browser reuse, hard-busting `/admin/code-syntax` fetches with the running script version, and rehighlighting existing transcript code blocks from preserved raw source whenever colors, aliases, or keyword rules change.
• 🐞 Corrected generation stats latency reporting so live turns no longer publish a fake ever-increasing latency mid-stream; TTFT stays live during generation and the real end-to-end latency now appears only once the request actually finishes.

v0.8.18

• ⚡ Isolated chat status polling further so background refreshes on the Chat tab now use a lightweight stats/action-state updater during live turns instead of running the broader chat UI renderer, reducing non-transcript DOM churn while generation is in progress.
• 🐞 Fixed the user-facing chat latency metric so it now freezes at first response / first token timing for that turn instead of climbing continuously like total wall-clock duration during generation.

v0.8.17

• ⚡ Smoothed live chat generation again by cutting back mid-stream Markdown boundary rescans and deferring syntax-highlight work during active streaming unless a fenced code block actually finalizes, bringing realtime output behavior back closer to 0.8.12 / 0.8.13.
• 🐞 Fixed code-syntax updates end to end by serving /admin/code-syntax directly from the embedded payload when available, rewriting the sidecar file from that payload, and invalidating already-highlighted transcript code when the syntax config changes so updated colors and token rules repaint old chats too.
• 🖥️ Reworked the cache/context stats so KV now only shows real reported KV-cache usage from the runtime, while natural context fill is shown separately as context: used / max (%) instead of being mixed into the KV number.

v0.8.16

• 🐞 Paused remote update checks while the Run Update modal is open, so the green update header and button state stay quiet until the modal closes and polling resumes.
• 🐞 Fixed live chat stream recovery so same-page generations no longer rebuild mid-turn from the temp stream cache, while refresh recovery still restores the in-progress assistant reply and refuses shorter stale cache snapshots.
• 🐞 Fixed code-syntax refresh so shipped updates now rewrite stale on-disk code_syntax.json, the browser prefers the live /admin/code-syntax payload over embedded JS fallback data, and removed theme tokens now clear their old CSS variables immediately.
• 🖥️ Cleaned up chat/runtime stat labels by removing the ~ prefix from per-message input counts and applying : separators consistently to per-message output/TTFT/tk-s labels plus generation-stat fields that were still using bare words.

v0.8.15

• 🐞 Paused remote update checks while the Run Update modal is open, so the green update header and button state stay quiet until the modal closes and polling resumes.
• 🐞 Fixed live chat stream recovery so same-page generations no longer rebuild mid-turn from the temp stream cache, while refresh recovery still restores the in-progress assistant reply and refuses shorter stale cache snapshots.
• 🐞 Fixed code-syntax refresh so shipped updates now rewrite stale on-disk `code_syntax.json`, the browser prefers the live `/admin/code-syntax` payload over embedded JS fallback data, and removed theme tokens now clear their old CSS variables immediately.
• 🖥️ Cleaned up chat/runtime stat labels by removing the `~` prefix from per-message input counts and applying `:` separators consistently to per-message output/TTFT/tk-s labels plus generation-stat fields that were still using bare words.

v0.8.14

• 🐞 Fixed chat-message persistence so per-message token/speed stats, conversation totals, generation flags, and other runtime metadata now survive reloads instead of being stripped out when the conversation is re-saved on the backend.
• ⚡ Reworked live chat streaming recovery so the browser now keeps saving partial assistant output during generation, the backend tracks in-flight stream state by conversation, and refreshing mid-turn can resume the live reply instead of dropping the in-progress output.
• 🐞 Corrected chat telemetry/UI reporting so short user prompts no longer show whole-request context totals as if they were per-message token counts, while the runtime stats card now receives incremental streaming metrics including live KV usage updates.
• 🖥️ Reduced mobile transcript freeze pressure by deferring heavy transcript DOM re-renders while the user is actively scrolling or resizing during generation, then catching back up once interaction settles.

v0.8.13

• 🐞 Fixed the remaining markup/Markdown rendering regressions: HTML/XML fenced blocks now use visible tag colors again, footnote and relative-anchor links scroll to their targets inside the chat transcript, Mermaid export buttons use new inline SVG icons, and admonitions now get type-matched accent colors plus 16x16 icons.
• 🐞 Corrected chat/runtime telemetry handling so per-message token badges no longer reuse cumulative request totals, conversation stats now report cumulative usage, inactive conversations no longer stay stuck on a generating status, and KV/prefix reporting now avoids stale peak carryover from prior requests.
• ⚡ Reworked long-running command/log streaming paths so model-install jobs now flush carriage-return progress updates into Audit Logs instead of stalling after a couple of visible lines, and the Debug Log viewer now includes an interactive bash command lane with Ctrl+Enter send support.
• 🖥️ Replaced model-family card summaries with generated family-level descriptions so each model card describes its available preset mix instead of repeating the first preset's `best_for` line.

v0.8.12

• 🐞 Restored visible full-markup syntax coloring for HTML/XML-style code blocks by wiring `.chat-syntax-tag` and `.chat-syntax-attribute` to their dedicated theme tokens instead of the generic variable/constant fallbacks that left most tags looking like plain text.
• 🖥️ Tuned the existing chat syntax palette so markup tags now use the same cyan family already present elsewhere in the UI, while attributes continue to use the existing green accent for clearer tag/attribute separation without introducing a new color scheme.

v0.8.11

• 🐞 Fixed HTML fenced-code rendering so markup blocks now display literal `<` and `>` characters again instead of leaking double-escaped `<` / `>` entities into the chat transcript.
• 🛠️ Reworked the markup syntax highlighter to tokenize raw HTML/XML input before the final safe-escape pass, which closes the double-escaping hole at the renderer layer instead of relying on fragile per-block workarounds.

v0.8.10

• 🐞 Fixed the runtime-inventory status path so compose variants whose canonical name/path is explicitly experimental, including `dual/eagle3-experimental`, now stay classified as Experimental all the way from backend inventory generation through the preset UI grouping.
• 🐞 Expanded the lightweight self-contained LaTeX renderer with a broader KaTeX-aligned baseline for common symbols and syntax, including the basic hbar/hslash/ell/imath/jmath/Re/Im/R/N/Z/Complex letter commands, the dots/cdots/ldots/vdots/ddots/mathellipsis family, `smallmatrix` and `subarray`, and `cr` row breaks.

v0.8.9

• 🛠️ Removed the `--allow-stale-metadata` bypass from the live build pipeline, so `build.py` now always enforces the metadata freshness guard instead of allowing stale release rebuilds.
• 🐞 Fixed the Setup Assistant survey selection repaint, renamed it to Preset Recommendation Survey, kept explicitly experimental presets like `dual/eagle3-experimental` in the Experimental group, and aligned the Custom Model modal’s right column with a clearer sidebar header.

v0.8.8

• 🐞 Stopped the installer and migration flows from mutating the upstream `club-3090` checkout before calling `scripts/update.sh`, fixing the dirty-working-tree failure reported when a fresh install hit the final upstream update step.
• 🛠️ Removed several genuinely unreferenced helper paths from the active split sources, trimming dead build, updater, runtime-inventory, shared, and instance-management cruft without changing live behavior.

v0.8.7

• 🐞 Fixed the split-source web build mismatch so the real `web/` source now carries the Summary-tab, preview-grouping, advanced-preset, blocked-launch warning, and Setup Assistant fixes instead of only patching the generated bundle.
• 🐞 Rebuilt the shipped admin assets from the corrected split sources and revalidated the generated installer path, so this release actually packages the intended preset/UI fixes alongside the earlier runtime/download backend changes.
• 🛠️ Updated `build.py` cleanup behavior so successful builds remove generated root bundle files by default, with a new `--keep-files` escape hatch when you intentionally want to inspect the composed artifacts.

v0.8.6

• 🐞 Parallelized Global single/dual preset launches so the controller now fans out Docker boots across every eligible GPU or pair at once instead of waiting for each container to reach ready before starting the next one.
• 🐞 Reworked model-download tracking into a real multi-job flow, which allows multiple model installs to run concurrently, keeps each job visible in status, and stops one new download request from freezing the others' Audit Log progress.
• 🐞 Added a local Hugging Face fallback chain for Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B AutoRound downloads, fixing the stale upstream repo slug that was producing the `Qwen/Qwen3-MoE-A3B-Instruct-AutoRound-Int4-mixed` not-found failure on the live remote host.
• 🖥️ Fixed the Model Summary selector regression, regrouped NVLink + multi-GPU presets under Advanced Docker Presets, corrected preview/experimental/badge handling, added the blocked-launch hardware warning modal, and refreshed the Setup Assistant wording/logic including the gated Hugging Face custom-import lane.

v0.8.5

• 🐞 Fixed the self-update completion path so the updater now reads the freshly written server/service state before running readiness waits, instead of trusting stale startup env from the long-lived updater daemon.
• 🐞 Stopped controller-only updates from waiting on a removed or disabled Caddy service when HTTPS is off, which was the real source of the multi-minute post-install stall seen on the live host after the `v0.8.x` migration.
• 🐞 Hardened `--update` / `--migrate` mode-state restoration so the installer now preserves prior `--online use-https` behavior from the deployed systemd/Caddy topology as well as `server_config.json`, preventing a bad persisted flag from silently downgrading the machine back to plain HTTP.

v0.8.4

• 🐞 Fixed the self-update completion path so the updater now reads the freshly written server/service state before running readiness waits, instead of trusting stale startup env from the long-lived updater daemon.
• 🐞 Stopped controller-only updates from waiting on a removed/disabled Caddy service when HTTPS is off, which was the real source of the multi-minute post-install stall seen on the live host after the `v0.8.x` migration.

v0.8.3

• 🐞 Fixed the remote update version resolver so the panel now fetches `build/metadata.json` from the exact same commit SHA as the installer script, instead of mixing a SHA-pinned installer lookup with a branch-based metadata URL that could lag behind on GitHub raw caches.
• 🛠️ Reworked the installer's self-update environment contract to ship a SHA-aware metadata URL template alongside the installer URL template, keeping the control and updater services aligned on one immutable raw-source scheme.

• 🛠️ Removed the old accumulated release-history shell constant from the shipped installer contract entirely, so `build.py` no longer injects major-release notes into the installer and the build validator now fails if that embed path comes back.
• 🧰 Switched the controller's remote update metadata path to use GitHub `build/metadata.json` as the sole source of changelog/release data, instead of re-parsing release history out of the remote installer script.
• 🖥️ Updated the Run Update modal to render both changelog sections strictly from the fetched GitHub metadata payload, eliminating the old local shell-metadata fallback for major-release notes.

v0.8.1

• 🖥️ Rebuilt the Setup Assistant into a real recommendation quiz that uses the upstream workload metadata already present in the v0.8 inventory, then maps the answers back into model-first preset suggestions plus a suggested custom-import reference profile.
• 🖥️ Reworked the Custom Model entry point with the new circular plus icon treatment, replaced the cramped import modal with a cleaner two-column layout, and added clearer safety/override guidance alongside detected-rig context.
• 📝 Corrected `REMOTE.md` to match the live server's actual internal admin listener target (`127.0.0.1:18008`) so future remote audits and tunnels hit the right backend hop.

v0.8.0

• 🧩 Migrated the preset inventory to the upstream v0.8 registry/profile model so the panel now discovers the full modern catalog, including the new Qwen 3.6 35B-A3B and Gemma 4 26B-A4B families, shared-compose registry aliases, and the richer install metadata those variants need.
• 🟢 Added a first-class Custom Model flow in Presets: the selector now includes a `[+] Custom Model` entry point, imports stream the upstream `pull.sh` output into Audit Logs, successful imports register persistent custom runtime cards/tabs, and custom model removal now tears down the registered compose/runtime state instead of leaving orphaned panel entries behind.
• 🖥️ Reworked the Setup Assistant around the newer upstream recommendation model, adding rig-aware guidance, clearer production/preview cues for the new curated families, and an explicit advanced path for upstream custom imports without blowing up the existing model-first UX.
• 🐞 Fixed multiple v0.8 launch-path regressions uncovered on the live host: custom runtimes now keep their own host-model install path when launching, the registry-backed rebuild path now classifies the newer AWQ/MoE variants correctly, and vLLM launches once again export the upstream nightly pin so updated compose files stop resolving to the broken 
ightly-` image tag.
• 🛠️ Preserved the live host's sudo-safe Hugging Face CLI lookup improvement inside the newer upstream `setup.sh`, installed the missing `python-yaml` dependency required by the v0.8 profile loaders, and repaired the live admin white-page outage caused by accidentally deploying a split-source placeholder backend instead of the shipped embedded control bundle.

v0.7.12

• 🐞 Fixed the live Users tab save/delete flows so successful backend responses now update the visible directory cards immediately instead of leaving the panel stuck on stale `No API users configured yet` state until a later reload.
• 🐞 Fixed the custom API preset save/delete flows so the preset catalog now reconciles directly from the response payload, which removes the stale deleted-card behavior caught during the live audit.
• 🖥️ Corrected auxiliary-service status rendering so exited services like SearxNG no longer show contradictory `exited` and `stopped` states in the same card, and now surface exit-code detail consistently.
• 🛠️ Embedded `CHANGE_LOG_RELEASE` into the shipped installer metadata, sanitized control characters out of parsed changelog text, and fixed the remote update fetch helper's broken curl return path so status/update metadata handling is more robust.

v0.7.11

• ⚡ Restored incremental syntax highlighting timing for streamed replies so fenced code blocks now pick up coloring as soon as that block is finalized, instead of waiting for the entire assistant message to finish.

v0.7.10

• ⚡ Fixed streaming markdown so inline single-backtick code like ``[1,2,3,4,5,6]`` renders correctly while a reply is still generating, and forced the final fenced-code syntax highlight pass as soon as generation ends instead of waiting for a tab switch.

v0.7.9

• 🐞 Filtered `admin_auth_denied` noise out of the human audit stream while still preserving the structured event in `debug.log`, so repeated failed admin probes no longer spam the Audit viewer.
• 🐞 Stopped the large `----- admin result -----` / `----- admin error -----` payload dumps from polluting the Audit log pane and routed those verbose frontend diagnostics into the Debug log cache instead.
• ⚡ Fixed streaming markdown so inline single-backtick code like ``[1,2,3,4,5,6]`` renders correctly while a reply is still generating, and forced the final fenced-code syntax highlight pass as soon as generation ends instead of waiting for a tab switch.
• 🖥️ Reworked the Docker log instance selector for Global launches so it fans out into concrete targets like `GPU0 (Global)` and `PAIR0_1 (Global)` instead of collapsing back to a misleading single-scope default.

v0.7.8

• 🛠️ Consolidated the retained v0.7 release history into a single `v0.7.0` section and removed all `v0.6.x` entries from `CHANGE_LOG_RELEASE`, shrinking installer metadata without losing the current major-series summary.
• ⚡ Packed `code_syntax.json` into the shipped control payload as gzip+base64, now unpacks it to `/opt/club3090-control/code_syntax.json` on startup, and serves it from `/admin/code-syntax` so the large syntax-config blob no longer rides inside shipped JavaScript.
• 🧰 Audited `control/chat.py`, removed an unused in-memory conversation index path, and kept the chat storage/runtime behavior unchanged while trimming a little more dead weight.

v0.7.0

• 🛠️ Removed the remaining inert legacy-dual backend stubs, legacy status payload field, dead log-branch special cases, and other no-op compatibility leftovers that no longer participated in live runtime behavior.
• ⚡ Deleted several unreferenced UI runtime formatter functions and collapsed more dead legacy branches so the shipped JavaScript and final installer payload shrink further without changing current scope behavior.
• 📝 Updated the design docs again to reflect the cleaner post-cleanup state and the narrower set of legacy-oriented naming that still remains for non-dual reasons.
• 📝 Rewrote the main design docs to describe the current split-source architecture, canonical scope model, persistence layout, and build pipeline more accurately.
• 📝 Added a measured explanation for why the installer artifact did not shrink after the legacy dual-runtime refactor, including concrete byte deltas and the remaining compatibility residue.
• 📝 Reworked the v0.8 migration model and plan around actual readiness: schema-first normalization, upstream pull/generate wrappers, generated compose handling, and a separate advanced path for imported/custom models.
• 🐞 Fixed the updater readiness probe so successful self-updates no longer log a false admin-listener timeout before completion.
• 🖥️ Reworked the Instances scope strip so Global comes first, GPU tabs stay grouped, built-in and custom pair tabs follow together, and Create Custom Pair now lives on the same row with proper separators.
• 🖥️ Replaced the remaining outlined modal close buttons with the larger plain close style, added a dedicated GPU picker for custom pairs, and upgraded Wake-on-LAN into a validated single-line modal that preloads the configured default MAC.
• ⚡ Stopped syntax highlighting from re-touching live streaming transcript messages, which removes the code-block flicker during generation and preserves highlighting once the reply finishes.
• 🐞 Removed the leftover two-GPU Global summary special case and fixed stray edit/delete icon encoding regressions found during the post-refactor audit.
• ⚙️ Reordered the default dual-selector preference so automatic pair rows now favor the live-validated vllm/dual-dflash recipe before falling back to heavier Qwen dual compose variants.
• 🐞 Fixed dual-instance compose launches so instance project directories now anchor on the compose file's own folder, which restores relative dual-patch mounts like ../../patches/vllm-marlin-pad/... and prevents PAIR0_1 launches from dropping the required /vllm/ path segment.
• 🐞 Fixed stop_instance() so dual and single overlap handoffs no longer run the launch-time GPU memory guard during docker compose down, which allows busy runtimes to stop cleanly before a replacement scope starts.
• 🐞 Fixed controller self-updates so the updater now downloads the remote installer into a temporary file, refreshes /opt/club3090-control/install-club3090-server.sh, and then executes that cached copy, which keeps the local installer cache aligned with streamed update runs.
• 🔄 Hardened the installer's self-update source normalization so the repo URL, ref, branch, and raw script template always snap back to the canonical GitHub feed instead of persisting temporary override values from a previous update environment.
• 🧰 Split the backend monolith into the new control/ source tree, renamed the old telemetry slice to system.py, rebuilt the canonical target model around GLOBAL, GPU<n>, and PAIRx_y, removed the legacy dual-runtime behavior path, and made sequential auto-pairs the built-in dual layout while preserving custom pair groups.
• 🖥️ Split the admin frontend into the new web/ source tree, removed the GPU pairing toggle, updated scope and pair handling around automatic sequential pairs, and blocked deletion of built-in auto-pairs while leaving custom pair management intact.
• 🛠️ Reworked the build pipeline around build/, web/, and control/, extracted the smoke harness into build/smoke_tests.py, added the root build.py wrapper, moved build logs into logs/, and regenerated the root monolith artifacts from the split sources.
• 🛠️ Refreshed the status smoke fixtures to the canonical auto-pair model and reran the full local build, syntax, minification, UI, HTML, API, chat, and log smoke suite successfully against the new layout.
• 📝 Added v07_PROGRESS_REPORT.MD and v07_CHECKLIST.MD so the v0.7 refactor track can be resumed cleanly mid-stream if the work is ever interrupted.
